subcodes.first_line: As to your art, it is one of the teachings of Bahá'u'lláh that art is identical with an act of worship... Say, 'I have two arts, one physical, the other spiritual.
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @goodly deeds; actions, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the concourse on high, @work as worship
